description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a robust, rectangular metal enclosure with a matte dark finish. The front panel is equipped with a centrally positioned color display screen, surrounded by a metallic bezel and flanked by labeled buttons or touch areas for user interaction. Below the screen, there is a secure payment interface area, including a card reader slot and a keypad, as well as a possible receipt dispenser. The lower section of the front face has a lockable compartment, likely for maintenance or cash collection. The sides and back are plain, solid, and unadorned, emphasizing security and durability. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for public urban environments such as parking lots, transit stations, or sidewalks.
description: A sturdy, dark-colored self-service payment kiosk with a central display screen, payment interface, and secure lower compartment, designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the display screen, payment interface, keypad, and a lockable compartment, with all interactive elements clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, featureless back panel, emphasizing the kiosk's secure enclosure.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, uninterrupted surface.
attribute_display_screen: A medium-sized rectangular color display screen is centrally located on the upper front panel, surrounded by a metallic bezel, and oriented vertically for user interaction. The screen displays interface elements and text.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface area below the display includes a card reader slot, a numeric keypad, and possibly an NFC tap area, all integrated into the front panel for easy access.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A digital logo or branding is visible on the display screen, centered at the top, styled as part of the user interface.
attribute_instructional_signage: Instructional text and labels are present around the display screen and keypad, providing user guidance in a printed or digital format.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small horizontal slot below the keypad area serves as a receipt dispenser, easily accessible from the front.
